# Tora v1.2.2

This patch release fixes a startup crash in the packaged macOS application.

## Fixes

- Resolved a startup crash (dyld error) by adding `@executable_path/../Frameworks` to the `Tora` application binary's runtime search paths (`rpaths`). This allows the system to correctly locate the Sparkle framework in the app bundle.

## Included artifacts

The release workflow publishes:

- `appcast.xml`
- `Tora-v1.2.2-macos.zip`
- `Tora-v1.2.2-macos.zip.sha256`
- `Tora-v1.2.2-macos.dmg`
- `Tora-v1.2.2-macos.dmg.sha256`
